'''ravasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ifpology|ifpology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ifpology|ifpology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ravasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rævæsæth|rævæsæth]] || [[word:rævæsæj|rævæsæj]] || [[word:rævæsæsh|rævæsæsh]] || [[word:rævæsæ|rævæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravavasath|ravavasath]] || [[word:ravavasaj|ravavasaj]] || [[word:ravavasash|ravavasash]] || [[word:ravavasa|ravavasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravasath|ravasath]] || [[word:ravasaj|ravasaj]] || [[word:ravasash|ravasash]] || [[word:ravasa|ravasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravafsath|ravafsath]] || [[word:ravafsaj|ravafsaj]] || [[word:ravafsash|ravafsash]] || [[word:ravafsaf|ravafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ravasatha|ravasatha]] || [[word:ravasaja|ravasaja]] || [[word:ravasasha|ravasasha]] || [[word:ravasaka|ravasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ravasath|ravasath]] || [[word:ravasaj|ravasaj]] || [[word:ravasash|ravasash]] || [[word:ravasa|ravasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ravasathal|ravasathal]] || [[word:ravasajal|ravasajal]] || [[word:ravasashal|ravasashal]] || [[word:ravasakal|ravasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ravasathatha|ravasathatha]] || [[word:ravasajaja|ravasajaja]] || [[word:ravasashasha|ravasashasha]] || [[word:ravasaka|ravasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ravasathan|ravasathan]] || [[word:ravasajan|ravasajan]] || [[word:ravasashan|ravasashan]] || [[word:ravasakan|ravasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ravasathaoro|ravasathaoro]] || [[word:ravasajaoro|ravasajaoro]] || [[word:ravasashaoro|ravasashaoro]] || [[word:ravasakaoro|ravasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
